id: get-versions-registry-definitions-definition-id-versions-get
title: "Get version history for a definition"
description: "Return all versions of a definition, newest-first (created_at DESC)."

<Heading
  as=&#123;"h1"&#125;
  className=&#123;"openapi__heading"&#125;
  children=&#123;"Get version history for a definition"&#125;
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method=&#123;"get"&#125;
  path=&#123;"/registry/definitions/&#123;definition_id&#125;/versions"&#125;
  context=&#123;"endpoint"&#125;
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Return all versions of a definition, newest-first (created_at DESC).

Includes deprecation status, meaning_hash, and ir_hash per version.

HTTP 404 — definition not found.

  id=&#123;"request"&#125;
  as=&#123;"h2"&#125;
